name: Alex Morgan
title: Senior Software Engineer
summary: Pragmatic engineer with eight years of experience building developer-facing platforms. Comfortable owning a system end-to-end and equally happy shipping features, sharpening tooling, or mentoring teammates.

highlights: Led the migration of the document pipeline to a recipe-driven template system, cutting onboarding time for new templates from days to hours.
Mentored four engineers through promotion to senior, with two now leading their own initiatives.
Designed and shipped a multi-tenant theming layer that powers white-label deployments for 12 enterprise customers.
Owned the reporting subsystem serving 30M PDFs per year, holding p95 latency under 6 seconds.
Rewrote the asset pipeline to inline images as data URIs, removing an entire class of broken-render bugs.
Built a real-time collaboration layer on top of Postgres logical replication.
Introduced contract tests between the API and three frontend clients.
